# QuoteCat

> QuoteCat is a contractor financial intelligence platform. The mobile quoting app shows real profit on every quote, and a free resources hub (calculators, pricing guide, startup kit) helps contractors figure out what to charge before they bid. Clients pay contractors directly — zero payment processing fees.

## Key Facts

- Category: Construction / Field Service Management Software
- Platform: iOS, Android (coming soon)
- Website: https://quotecat.ai
- Resources hub: https://quotecat.ai/resources
- Support: hello@quotecat.ai

## What QuoteCat Does

QuoteCat is built around a thesis that competitors miss: most contractors don't know if they're actually making money on a job. QuoteCat closes that gap with two things working together.

**The mobile app** lets contractors build a professional quote in under 5 minutes from a custom price book, add labor and markup, and send a shareable link. The app shows real-time profit margin and estimated profit on every quote — so the contractor knows whether the quote is profitable *before* it goes out. Clients can accept or decline directly from the link, and the contractor gets notified in real-time.

**The resources hub** (free, no signup required for most tools) helps contractors figure out their numbers before they even open the app: a Labor Rate Calculator (what to charge per hour after real overhead), a Markup Calculator (markup vs margin), a Profit Margin Calculator (did the last job actually make money), a 90-Day Contractor Startup Kit, and the Contractor Pricing Guide ($29 standalone, included free with Pro and Premium).

## Zero Transaction Fees

Unlike competitors (Jobber, Housecall Pro, ServiceTitan) that charge 2.9% on every payment processed through their platform, QuoteCat charges zero transaction fees. Contractors set their preferred payment methods (Zelle, Venmo, CashApp, bank transfer, check, or any other method) and clients pay directly. The contractor keeps 100% of every payment.

For a contractor doing $300,000/year in jobs, this saves over $8,700/year compared to platforms that charge processing fees.

## Features

- Create quotes in 5 minutes on-site
- Share quotes as links (text or email)
- Client accept/decline directly from link
- Real-time notifications (viewed, accepted, declined)
- Good/Better/Best tiered pricing in one link
- Professional PDF export with company branding
- Custom price book and reusable assemblies
- Offline-first (works without internet, syncs later)
- Cloud sync across devices
- Invoice management
- Client management
- Contracts and e-signatures (Premium)
- Web portal with business analytics (Premium)
- Team and worker management via SMS (Premium)

## Pricing

- Free: $0/month - Unlimited quotes (local), unlimited clients, 10 PDF exports/month, 10 invoice exports/month, 10 spreadsheet exports/month, custom price book, zero transaction fees
- Pro: $29/month (founder pricing) - Unlimited exports, shareable links, notifications, cloud sync, reusable assemblies, no PDF watermark
- Premium: $79/month (founder pricing) - Everything in Pro plus contracts, e-signatures, web portal, business analytics, team management

All plans include zero transaction fees.

Founder pricing is locked in forever for early customers.

## Target Users

- General contractors
- Electricians
- Plumbers
- HVAC contractors
- Remodeling contractors
- Home improvement professionals
- Small construction businesses

## Competitors

QuoteCat competes with Jobber ($39-249/mo + 2.9% fees), Housecall Pro ($65-269/mo + 2.9% fees), ServiceTitan ($300+/mo + fees), Joist (free-$25/mo + fees), and Invoice2go ($5-20/mo + 2.9% fees).

QuoteCat differentiates on: zero transaction fees, mobile-first design, offline capability, shareable quote links with real-time notifications, and significantly lower pricing.
